name: Red Delicious Herbal Spiced Cider
recipeIngredient: 12 Ruby Mist, Red Zinger or other fruity herbal tea bags
1/4 cup freshly squeezed lemon juice (from 1 lemon)
Thin slices of lemon for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Steep the tea bags in the boiling water for 10 minutes.
2. Gently squeeze the tea bags and remove them from the water.
3. Add apple juice concentrate, lemon juice, cold water, and honey to taste.
4. Mix well and heat until warm.
5. Serve in mugs and garnish with lemon slices.
Per serving (without honey): 119 calories (1 percent from protein, 97 percent from carbohydrate, 2 percent from fat), less than 1 gram of protein, 30 grams of carbohydrate, less than 1 gram of fat, 0 cholesterol, 19 milligrams of sodium.
Exchanges: 2 fruit. Makes 8 servings.
